title: Yoshikuni Sato
text: Home * People * Yoshikuni Sato Yoshikuni Sato , a Japanese computer scientist at Graduate School of Systems and Information Engineering, Center for Computational Sciences, University of Tsukuba . His research interests includes Monte-Carlo Tree Search applied to Shogi . His paper A Shogi Program based on Monte-Carlo Tree Search [1] won the 2010 ICGA Journal Award . Selected Publications [ edit ] [2] Yoshikuni Sato , Daisuke Takahashi , Reijer Grimbergen ( 2010 ). A Shogi Program based on Monte-Carlo Tree Search . ICGA Journal, Vol. 33, No. 2 Yoshikuni Sato , Makoto Miwa , Shogo Takeuchi , Daisuke Takahashi ( 2013 ). Optimizing Objective Function Parameters for Strength in Computer Game-Playing .
